completed.title: aios-evidence — retention-class compaction worker per S3.1 §11.5 / §12 / §13 (M2 CLOSER)
completed.evidence: 364 tests (+34 over T-014 330). New crates/aios-evidence/src/compaction.rs (~600 LoC; 19 unit tests). Closed CompactionPolicy (Auto / OperatorApproval default per §11.5 / Disabled). CompactionWorker with sync tick(&mut self, backend, now) primitive; approve_segment for out-of-band approval; CompactionReport with eligible/compacted/awaiting/receipts_removed/index_entries_pruned counts. CompactionBackend trait implemented for both InMemoryEvidenceLog and RocksDbEvidenceLog. RocksDB compact_segment is atomic WriteBatch (delete receipts CF + record_type_index CF rows; set compacted_at::<id> sentinel in metadata CF; segment row in segments CF UNTOUCHED so recover_sealed_chain on reopen continues to verify). RecordType +1: CompactionApprovalRequired (wire ID 1000, FOREVER) — first Wave 14+ reserved-range constitutional addition. Total variants 428 (Wave 13 dense 1..=427 + Wave 14+ reserved 1). aios-evidence Cargo.toml 0.0.1 → 0.1.0 (M2 closure marker). cargo build/test/clippy/fmt all PASS. M2 closed honestly: 9 tasks T-007..T-015 complete; no debt carried into M3.
